sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81995" key="periporfuro/shmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περι-πορφῠρόσημος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παῖς, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Lat. <sense id="n81995.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">puer praetextatus,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.185</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Strat.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
